name: FlameBite
heroCopy: Juicy burgers, loaded pizzas, crispy tacos, and ice-cold drinks made for cravings that cannot wait.

menu.name: Double Flame Burger
menu.description: Two smashed beef patties, cheddar, caramelized onions, signature flame sauce.

menu.name: Crispy Chicken Burger
menu.description: Golden fried chicken, pickles, lettuce, spicy mayo, toasted brioche.

menu.name: Pepperoni Rush
menu.description: Mozzarella, pepperoni, oregano, and a crispy golden crust.

menu.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
menu.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, chicken, red onions, mozzarella, fresh herbs.

menu.name: Loaded Street Tacos
menu.description: Seasoned beef, pico de gallo, cheddar, lime crema, cilantro.

menu.name: Philly Melt Sandwich
menu.description: Steak strips, melted cheese, peppers, onions, toasted roll.

menu.name: Fresh Lemon Cooler
menu.description: House lemonade with mint, crushed ice, and citrus sparkle.

offers.title: Burger Duo Deal
offers.description: Two burgers, two fries, two drinks. Perfect for a fast lunch.

offers.title: Family Pizza Box
offers.description: Two large pizzas, wings, and a 1L drink for sharing.

offers.title: Late Night Tacos
offers.description: Buy 3 tacos, get 1 free after 9 PM.

benefits.title: Fast Delivery
benefits.text: Hot food at your door with delivery optimized for speed.

benefits.title: Fresh Ingredients
benefits.text: Prepped daily for stronger flavor and cleaner quality.

benefits.title: Affordable Prices
benefits.text: Combos and portions built for value without cutting quality.

benefits.title: High Quality
benefits.text: Consistent recipes, polished service, and craveable taste.

reviews.name: Maya R.
reviews.text: The burger arrived hot and the sauce is unreal. Ordering took less than a minute.

reviews.name: Daniel K.
reviews.text: Best late-night tacos downtown. The WhatsApp order option is super easy.

reviews.name: Sofia M.
reviews.text: Fresh, fast, and the combo deals are actually worth it.

reviews.name: Amir B.
reviews.text: Clean place, quick pickup, and the pizza crust is perfect.
